name: accounting firms managing 10–20 vendor invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 vendor invoices/month, delayed reporting causes late payments. We automate report generation and emailing instead of manual compilation of reports and email reminders.
problem_solved: delayed vendor payments due to lack of timely aging reports
features: email notifications to accounts payable teams

locked_fields.primary_problem: delayed vendor payments due to lack of timely aging reports

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual compilation of reports and email reminders
must_have_features: email notifications to accounts payable teams
